title: ORDER BY ignored if query has identical GROUP BY
poc: SELECT x,y FROM t1 GROUP BY x, y ORDER BY x, y;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY ignored with identical GROUP BY in query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER, y INTEGER, z TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE INDEX idx_t1_yx ON t1(y, x);
SELECT x, y FROM t1 GROUP BY x, y ORDER BY x, y;
SELECT x, y FROM t1 WHERE z IS NULL ORDER BY y DESC;
